SIM-NEGOTIATION-NPC-V2.clarification_purpose: Valid behavioural negotiation evidence when primary NEGT Likert is blocked
SIM-NEGOTIATION-NPC-V2.trigger: neg_sim_telemetry_missing OR conf(NEG-SKILL)<0.65 OR post CLAR-NEG-V2 SJT avg<0.55
SIM-NEGOTIATION-NPC-V2.setup: Stakeholder NPC requests +2 scope items and -2 days on deadline. 3 rounds max. BATNA disclosed in round 2 if probe_count>=1.

npc_responses.round1_hardline: Reject first offer; open if candidate asks about priorities or constraints
npc_responses.round2_interest: Reveal quality vs date trade-off if probed
npc_responses.round3_final: Accept creative package: drop nice-to-have OR add contractor day OR phased launch

SIM-NEGOTIATION-NPC-V2.success: composite>=0.65 AND probe_count>=1 AND NOT walkaway_without_probe

runtime_spec.mobile: tap-based offer cards; text probe optional voice-to-text

SIM-NEGOTIATION-NPC-V2.why_change: Primary NEGT measured irritability not negotiation skill

SIM-FORMAT-LAB-CLAR.clarification_purpose: Measure rule-change and format-switch adaptation (LRN-ADAPT, LRN-META)
SIM-FORMAT-LAB-CLAR.setup: One micro-concept taught in video (90s) then diagram (60s). Quiz 3 items each. Rule-change: round 3 penalizes speed, rewards accuracy. Candidate receives 1 new format (text checklist) for final 2 items.
SIM-FORMAT-LAB-CLAR.why_change: Learning agility had no clar pathway; only 3 LRN-FB tags in J1

SIM-WORK-STYLES-ARENA-CLAR.clarification_purpose: Triangulate WST when Arena vector conflicts with SJT workstyle
SIM-WORK-STYLES-ARENA-CLAR.setup: 4 binary choices: structured vs flexible plan, solo vs collaborative deep work, rapid iterate vs thorough spec, visible leadership vs behind-scenes support.
SIM-WORK-STYLES-ARENA-CLAR.scoring_rubric: Vector → WST-INIT, WST-COOP, WST-LEAD, WST-STRUCT; compare cosine to primary Arena
SIM-WORK-STYLES-ARENA-CLAR.why_change: Work Styles Arena missing from V1 clar library

SIM-EXPERT-CHALLENGE-CLAR.clarification_purpose: Role-adaptive domain probe + rotated overclaiming fakes
SIM-EXPERT-CHALLENGE-CLAR.setup: 5 items: 3 real role concepts, 2 rotated fakes from pool (alpha/beta/gamma). Timed 120s total.
SIM-EXPERT-CHALLENGE-CLAR.why_change: Fixed fake concepts coachable; Expert Challenge not in clar

SIM-ECOSYSTEM-ARCHITECT-CLAR.clarification_purpose: Validate sector value-chain understanding by construction
SIM-ECOSYSTEM-ARCHITECT-CLAR.setup: Drag 6 nodes (supplier, platform, customer, regulator, payment, logistics) into valid value chain for target sector.
SIM-ECOSYSTEM-ARCHITECT-CLAR.scoring_rubric: Edge accuracy vs expert graph; partial credit for locally valid subgraphs
SIM-ECOSYSTEM-ARCHITECT-CLAR.why_change: Ecosystem Architect in primary flow but not clar

SIM-SPOT-THE-BREAK-CLAR.trigger: U17 substitution OR dec_divergence with in_tray_tau>=0.7
SIM-SPOT-THE-BREAK-CLAR.setup: 3 panels: find anomaly in dashboard, chat log, process diagram (60s each).
SIM-SPOT-THE-BREAK-CLAR.scoring_rubric: Hit rate + false alarm rate; SS-PS linkage
SIM-SPOT-THE-BREAK-CLAR.why_change: Avoid duplicate in-tray fatigue per U17

SIM-PRESSURE-COOKER-CLAR.clarification_purpose: Stress tolerance when in-tray re-run blocked
SIM-PRESSURE-COOKER-CLAR.trigger: stress_split_index beyond threshold AND U17 active
SIM-PRESSURE-COOKER-CLAR.setup: Steadiness trace 90s with rising distractors; measure degradation and recovery.
SIM-PRESSURE-COOKER-CLAR.why_change: U11 stress split needed alternate measure

SIM-DAY-AS-JOINER-CLAR.clarification_purpose: Resolve ownership vs path ambiguity in 3-node branch
SIM-DAY-AS-JOINER-CLAR.setup: Node1: unclear task assignment. Node2: optional stretch vs deliver minimum. Node3: report status to manager.
SIM-DAY-AS-JOINER-CLAR.why_change: Day-as-joiner in primary but not clar for ownership/path splits

v1_deprecations.simulation_ref_items: Do not score as simulation method — weight 0.0 in v3 fusion
